message:
chore: update session store and regenerate conformance reports

- src/session_store_v2.rs: session store updates from concurrent agent
- tests/ext_conformance/reports/: refreshed conformance report and
  summary with current timestamps and correlation IDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
